title: Electricity transmission licence exemption: Seagreen Wind Energy Limited (SWEL)
body: " Update: 15 January 2025  We have published a summary of responses and note of the outcome.   We are seeking views on a proposed time-limited exemption from the requirement to hold a transmission licence in respect of the offshore wind farm owned and operated by Seagreen Wind Energy Limited (SWEL).  Please send responses to essupport@energysecurity.gov.uk by midnight on 13 December 2024.  "
